title: Notifications - Update Available
scenario: Background firmware update notification redirects to Device Settings > Software Update tab when tapped on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has firmware lower than the current version available on the server.
3. Press the Home button on the Android device to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
4. Wait for the app to check for firmware updates in the background.
5. Observe the Android notification shade for a notification indicating a firmware update is available.
7. Observe the app behavior after tapping the notification.
expected: A notification appears in the Android notification shade indicating a firmware update is available. Tapping the notification opens the Poly Studio Mobile app and redirects the user to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
